name: Optua
notes:
Optua is a Scottish telco provider delivering gigabit-first fibre broadband services to areas across Scotland. All peers are required to have a complete PeeringDB entry and 24x7 NOC. PeeringDB is used for provisioning peering sessions. The number of prefixes we advertise will vary across sessions, and over time.

We generally operate an open peering policy however **all peers must ensure their PeeringDB remains up to date and accurate**.

**Please send all peering and capacity planning requests, including ASN, to peering@as202076.net.**

We operate at major IXPs across the UK and Europe including LONAP, LINX and we are constantly joining more as we expand. If your IXP isn't available but you'd still like to peer, please contact us and we can notify you if/when we join your IXP.
